title: Classic Comfort British Sausages Full English Breakfast
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring sausages, eggs, and mirepoix-base vegetables, perfect for a midnight craving, this satvik-friendly full English breakfast is grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill and served with a side of sugar syrup for a touch of sweetness and a drizzle of mustard for added flavor.

ingredients.name: British sausages
ingredients.notes: preferably made with pork and seasoned with salt, pepper, and herbs

ingredients.name: sugar syrup
ingredients.notes: made by dissolving sugar in water

instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to a medium-high heat, ensuring the charcoal is spread evenly and the grill is clean.
Grill the British sausages for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until they are cooked through and lightly charred.
While the sausages are cooking, heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of oil.
Add the sliced onions to the pan and cook for 5 minutes, or until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the grated carrots and sliced celery to the pan and cook for a further 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together, then pour them into a non-stick pan coated with a small amount of oil and scramble them until they are cooked through.
To serve, place the grilled sausages onto a plate, then add a spoonful of the mirepoix-base vegetables and a scrambled egg.
Drizzle the sugar syrup over the top of the dish, followed by a dollop of mustard.
